extract: Totodile (Japanese: ワニノコ Waninoko) is a Water-type Pokémon introduced in Generation II. It evolves into Croconaw starting at level 18, which evolves into Feraligatr starting at level 30. Along with Chikorita and Cyndaquil, Totodile is one of the three first partner Pokémon of Johto available at the beginning of Pokémon Gold, Silver, Crystal, HeartGold, and SoulSilver. It is also one of the three first partner Pokémon of Lumiose City in Pokémon Legends: Z-A, alongside Chikorita and Tepig.
